ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the metrics are associated with */,
  "executable_statement_count" INTEGER /* Count of executable statements in the code */,
  "max_allowed_executable" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed executable statement count */,
  "max_line_length" INTEGER /* Length of the longest line of code */,
  "max_allowed_line_length" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed line length */,
  "method_length" INTEGER /* Length of the longest method */,
  "max_allowed_method_length" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed method length */,
  "anonymous_inner_class_length" INTEGER /* Length of the longest anonymous inner class */,
  "max_allowed_anon_inner_length" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed length for anonymous inner classes */,
  "outer_types_defined" INTEGER /* Count of outer types defined */,
  "max_allowed_outer_types" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed outer types defined */,
  "code_complexity" REAL /* Code complexity score */,
  "code_coverage" REAL /* Code coverage percentage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used (e.g., Git, SVN) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that the violation is associated with */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was recorded */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object affected by the action (e.g., project, user, metric) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., review, violation, system update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control_systems" (
  "vcs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control system */,
  "vcs_name" TEXT /* Name of the version control system */,
  "vcs_url" TEXT /* URL of the version control system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vcs_id")
)
